name: Appalachian Mountain Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 4 cups fresh or canned fruit or berries, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) with the milk and vanilla until smooth.
2. Melt the butter in a 8 x 10-inch baking pan.
3. Pour the batter over the melted butter.
4. Place the fruit on top of the batter.
5. Pour the fruit juice over the fruit.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 30-35 minutes, or until lightly browned.
